description: Standardized PR title and description template for test hardening improvements. Use this template when generating pull requests.

# PR Description Template

This skill provides the standardized template for generating pull request titles and descriptions when submitting test hardening improvements.

## Usage

Before generating any PR title or description, read the template to ensure compliance with the required format.

| Template | Purpose | When to Use |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| [pr-template.md](references/pr-template.md) | PR title and description format for test hardening improvements | When creating a pull request for test hardening edits |

## Rules

- You MUST follow the exact format defined in the template
- Ensure all sections of the template are filled out accurately based on your audit and applied edits
- PR description length limit: under 4,000 characters
- Always include the metadata section for tracking purposes
